entry.title: Domination
entry.summary:
Author: Mariessa

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 31,727Chapters: 13/25Kudos: 102

Summary: Dick struggles to keep his family together. Too bad life had other plans and he's meeting his maker. --- "I apologize." Dick's voice was far, far away. "I do love you, Jason. I love you like everyone else." "Well, I didn't." --- NOTE 2026: I am actively editing this so every once in a while you may see the word count change. I have cleaned up the tags also so its not as confusing for new readers and will update every few months.

entry.title: sweet sweet slumber
entry.summary:
Author: thearkhamknightmare

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 904Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 15

Summary: He'd just about settled when he felt Jason's hands exploring him, leaning slightly into the touch as Jason's hands roamed absent mindedly. In his tired stupor, Dick couldn't help but notice Jason's hard on. It had been nestled in the small of Dick's back while Jason had his hands exploring. There's a slight shuffle and the sound of ruffling through a drawer in the nightstand that had Dick aware of exactly what Jason had been doing. The flip of a cap helped cement it as well. or: day two - somnophilia

entry.title: You've Got My Body, Flesh, and Bone
entry.summary:
Author: kitnotkat95

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,477Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 38

Summary: "I will kill for you." The Talon's voice was still not quite human as it rang through Jason's mind, Jason's would-be attacker dangling precariously from the Talon's grip on his ankle."Please don't." Jason answered aloud, hating that his motivations for the plea were more self-serving than attempts at mercy. If something happened to this guy, Bruce might have questions that Jason wouldn't know how to begin answering."As you wish it, little wing," The Talon trilled tossing the man aside carelessly before spreading his wings and lithely launching up beyond where the city lights of Gotham could reach him.Until next time.ORJason's been trained by the best supernatural hunter Gotham's ever known, but there's one Talon he can't bring himself to do anything about even as they keep coming face to face over the years.For GGH JayDick Week prompts:hunter! Jason x magical creature! Dick"I will kill for you." -"Please don't."

entry.title: But you know it ain't the real cherry
entry.summary:
Author: arakhnoidsilk

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,249Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 52

Summary: With the bitter reminder that he was just a man and, by consequence, very much weak to Dick Grayson's existence, Jason was also reminded of the fact that he had, indeed, a spank bank of memories about his supposed-to-be older brother.And now he had a Nightwing-themed fleshlight in his hands, with an ad that promoted the tool to be "just as tight and soft as the real thing". How did the people making this toy know that? Jason didn't want to know; he was fairly sure that his brother hadn't gone through a whole process of making a fleshlight of his own ass, so maybe people were just attracted by the thought of it being true.Either way, there was a big issue now: he had a Nightwing-themed sex toy in his house, and he didn't want to give it to any of Dick's friends because what if they actually enjoyed it? What if they managed to actually get closer to Dick enough that they could fuck him?

entry.title: Watercolour Promises
entry.summary:
Author: bluewingsofthenight

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,426Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 22

Summary: Sometimes, all you needed to remember to live was someone else to remind you that you are worth it as you are.You didn't need to prove or compromise yourself.Sometimes just having someone stand by you, loving you was enough to breathe easier. For Day 1: "I will kill for you." entry.title: I'll Build You Back (Somehow)
entry.summary:
Author: WakingNightmares

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 80,235Chapters: 13/16Kudos: 571

Summary: Jason gives him an exasperated look as they get to the front door. “Seriously, Dick. I’m fine. Promise. I’ve had a helluva lot worse than this, and still managed a patrol, with a lot less sleep than this. I’ll take it easy, keep the ass-kickin’ to a minimum tonight, alright?” He says with a grin. And fuck the things Dick would do for that grin. It erases the hard edges, the cold and calculating Red Hood, leaving behind a mischievous looking young man, rather than a younger version of Bruce. So he sighs. “Fine. Just call me if you need anything, okay? I’m gonna be in town for a few days anyways, until we get this Two-Face thing figured out, so it’s not like it’s out of my way,” Dick says as he steps outside into the driveway. “Besides, it’d be nice to hang out more often.” Jason gives Dick an unsure look, and for a moment, Dick can feel his heart sink a bit. Did Jason not enjoy their breakfast? Dick had intruded, to be fair, but Jason had seemed to enjoy - “Yeah? You wanna hang?”

entry.title: beast of blood
entry.summary:
Author: thearkhamknightmare

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,341Chapters: 1/2Kudos: 14

Summary: We can have a conversation, hunter," the vampire in front of him says, still lurking in the shadows. Jason hears the soft footfalls of the vampire's feet getting closer and closer; most people would be scared—terrified even—at the thought of being stalked like prey, but Jason invites it with something that Jason can't place. The feeling in his gut is unfamiliar but his hand is still gripping the stake at his hip, one that gets knocked out of his hand as the vampire gets close. "Ah, ah, ah," the vampire chides, suddenly as visibile as ever, "Like humans, hunter. I won't hurt you unless you give me a reason. And that stake is a reason for me to hurt you." or: day one - hunter!jason and magical creature!dick

entry.title: Scary Monsters (And Super Creeps)
entry.summary:
Author: mermaidautopsy

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,858Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 3

Summary: 'I'm not sure which I should preform first; an exorcism, or pest removal' John grumbled to no one but himself, flicking his lighter back to life and kissing it to the end of his last, crumpled cigarette. Chas, characterisically unimpressed with the warlock's lax attitude towards the case, grumbled something no doubt vulgarly worded to himself out of John's earshot in return. A third voice; calm, collected, and to John's ears, far too distinctly Gothamite for his liking, entered the conversation without waiting to ask either of the gentlemen for permission. 'If you let me take out the vermin, there won't be any need for your cheap magic tricks' the Red Hood spoke through his visor, exiting the shadows that pervaded the entrenched canal walkway, stalking towards the two men where they stood, hands shoved in their pockets, bickering under a half-dead streetlamp at the water's edge. 'Well our kid, Chas and I, we can't take you up on that most generous offer of yours. See, we've already come so far out here as to freeze our arses off, might as well let us finish the job' John shot back, puffing up smoke and steam alike as he offered the young vigilante a pointed glare 'In summery; fuck off'.

entry.title: that color I saw with you, was just simply too beautiful
entry.summary:
Author: rainiswriting

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,511Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 30

Summary: It always started with a plan going rogue, a misstep, a miscalculation that made everything fall apart. Contrary to popular belief, the bats could still make these mistakes that could cost a life. Luckily, in this scenario, it wasn't a life that was being threatened, but someone's dignity, which could be seen as worse. “Next is a rare and delicate item that’s been leered upon for years. His beauty is unmatched, with legs that could go back that didn’t make you question on how he does in bed!”
